meta.title: Complementation of adeno-associated virus growth with temperature- sensitive mutants of human adenovirus types 12 and 5 -- Handa et al. 29 (2): 239 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Temperature-sensitive mutants of human adenovirus types 12 and 5, defective in viral DNA synthesis, were able to support growth of adeno- associated virus type I at the non-permissive temperature.
